agent.error.model_tool_call_required.mes: The model skipped the Agent tool flow and tried to answer directly. No chat message was committed. Try regenerating; if this keeps happening, reduce the context or use a model with stronger tool calling.
agent.error.model_tool_call_required.sum: The model skipped the Agent tool flow; no message was committed.
agent.error.tool_after_finish.message: The model requested more tools after workspace.finish, which breaks the Agent contract. No chat message was committed. Try regenerating; if this persists, lower the temperature or pick a model that obeys workspace.finish.
agent.error.tool_after_finish.summary: The model kept calling tools after workspace.finish; no message was committed.
agent.error.max_tool_rounds_exceeded.mes: The Agent loop exceeded the configured maximum tool rounds before calling workspace.finish. No chat message was committed. Try regenerating with a tighter prompt, or raise the round budget in the profile.
agent.error.max_tool_rounds_exceeded.sum: Tool round budget exhausted; no message was committed.
agent.error.profile_model_requires_confi: This Agent profile needs a local model selection before it can run. Open Agent System, choose a saved model target for the profile, then run it again.
Agent profile needs a local model selection.

tauritavern.error.network.connect_failed: Could not connect to the target service. Your network, VPN, proxy, or endpoint address may be unavailable.
tauritavern.error.network.proxy_failed: Could not connect through the configured proxy.
tauritavern.error.network.dns_failed: Could not find the target service address.
tauritavern.error.network.tls_failed: Could not establish a secure connection.
tauritavern.error.network.body_interrupt: The response was interrupted while it was being read.
tauritavern.error.network.action: Check your network, VPN, proxy, or custom endpoint address, then try again.
Dynamic Theme & Wallpaper hint: Automatically switch TauriTavern themes and global wallpapers with the system light/dark mode.
Dynamic Theme help: mapping: Day = system light mode. Night = system dark mode.
Dynamic Theme help: behavior: Theme switching behaves like changing the theme dropdown. Wallpaper switching updates the global SillyTavern background and respects chat-locked backgrounds.
